module-checks.check-1: apply-domain-policy succeeds for one issued SNI and records runtime state.
module-checks.check-2: Startup replay loads active assignments idempotently.
module-checks.check-3: Bridge unavailable path returns degraded status without breaking login/VPN APIs.

scenarios.scenario-1: New assignment is applied to MTProto policy runtime.
scenarios.scenario-2: Backend restart replays active SNI assignments.
scenarios.scenario-3: Runtime bridge failure marks assignment pending/degraded and emits safe operator evidence.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Policy logs can include SNI but never include secret, token, or full proxy URL.
